metadata.source: Coxhead, A. (2000). A new academic word list. TESOL Quarterly, 34(2), 213-238.
metadata.validation: Present-Thomas, R., Weltens, B., & de Jong, J.H.A.L. (2013). Defining proficiency. Dutch Journal of Applied Linguistics, 2(1), 57-76.
metadata.description: Academic Word List - all 570 headwords, one per word family (most frequent form)
